Thanks for contributing to JuggerHub! Please fill this in so reviewers have the
context they need. Delete sections that don't apply.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this addresses, e.g. "Closes #123". Open PRs are easier to
     accept when there's an issue agreeing on the approach first. -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Screenshots (for UI changes)

<!-- Before/after screenshots or a short clip. Confirm it follows DESIGN.md. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The change follows the [constitution](../.specify/memory/constitution.md)
      conventions (thin controllers, DTOs, pagination, server-side auth, etc.).
- [ ] UI changes follow [DESIGN.md](../DESIGN.md).
- [ ] I ran the relevant test suites and they pass.
- [ ] I did not commit any secrets, and no `.env`/credentials are included.
- [ ] For a significant behavior/API/schema/auth change, I opened an issue first
      to agree on the approach.
